title: STAR Architecture Decision - R/SEEK Edge AI Under Constraints
content:
Architecture Decision: Edge-first AI design under hardware constraints

Situation:
- Robotics internship environment required real-time behavior on limited embedded hardware.
- Cloud-dependent designs were unsuitable for low-latency, classroom-ready operation.

Task:
- Choose a deployment and model strategy compatible with constrained compute and response-time needs.

Action:
- Prioritized edge-first inference patterns and efficient model behavior over heavyweight cloud assumptions.
- Aligned model and control-loop design to hardware, battery, and latency limits.
- Focused on practical reliability and safety behavior in real-time operation.
- Validated design choices through applied testing in embedded conditions.

Result:
- Source narrative reports strong applied outcomes in edge AI internship work.
- Decision expanded architecture fluency from cloud ML to embedded real-time systems.
